meaning: n.(临时性)木板房,兵舍,军营vt.使驻兵营内
examples: The crowd began to barrack the visiting team.
"Barrack" could mean booing somebody in English.
Marty Leclerc, the managing partner of Barrack Yard Advisors, an investment firm in Bryn Mawr, Pa.
Another billionaire investor whose investment outfits participated in TALF was Thomas Barrack, Jr.
